features.name: Event capture
features.description: Capture user interactions: click, input, scroll, navigate, submit, change events from the DOM
acceptanceCriteria: Click events captured with coordinates
Input events debounced and captured with final value
Scroll events throttled and captured with position
Form submit events captured
SPA navigation detected via History API polling
Change events captured for select, date, time, color, range inputs

features.name: Element metadata and smart selectors
features.description: Extract comprehensive element metadata with CSS/XPath selectors and confidence scoring
acceptanceCriteria: Tag, id, classes, text, role, aria-label, name, type, href, placeholder extracted
CSS selector generated with priority cascade: data-testid > id > aria-label > classes > name > nth-of-type
XPath selector generated
Confidence score assigned based on selector stability (0.20-0.95)
BoundingBox captured for element position

features.name: Screenshot capture
features.description: Capture visible tab screenshot after each action with configurable JPEG quality
acceptanceCriteria: Screenshot taken via chrome.tabs.captureVisibleTab
Quality configurable via settings (40-100)
Screenshot stored as data URL in CapturedAction
Graceful failure if screenshot fails

features.name: Tab video recording
features.description: Record tab video via MediaRecorder in offscreen document
acceptanceCriteria: Video capture via chrome.tabCapture.getMediaStreamId
Offscreen document handles MediaRecorder
Video blob saved to IndexedDB on stop
Start/stop lifecycle managed by background service worker

features.name: Template-based description generation
features.description: Generate human-readable descriptions for captured actions using templates
acceptanceCriteria: Each action type has a description template
Templates use element metadata (text, aria-label, placeholder, name, id, tag)
Descriptions are concise and readable

features.name: IndexedDB storage via Dexie
features.description: Persistent storage for sessions, actions, and video blobs using Dexie ORM over IndexedDB
acceptanceCriteria: Sessions table with CRUD operations
Actions table with compound index [sessionId+sequenceNumber]
VideoBlobs table for recorded videos
Ordered action queries by session
Transaction support for cascading deletes

features.name: SidePanel UI
features.description: Chrome side panel showing step list, step detail, notes editing, and export controls
acceptanceCriteria: Step list view with action type icons and descriptions
Step detail view with full metadata and screenshot
Notes editing per step with save
Navigation between list and detail views
Drag reorder of steps

features.name: Popup UI
features.description: Browser action popup with recording controls and status display
acceptanceCriteria: Start/Stop/Pause/Resume buttons based on status
Status indicator with color and label
Action count display during recording
Open side panel button
Keyboard shortcut hints displayed

features.name: Options page
features.description: Extension options page for configuring screenshot quality and throttle/debounce timers
acceptanceCriteria: Screenshot quality slider (40-100%)
Scroll throttle interval setting (500-3000ms)
Input debounce interval setting (200-2000ms)
Settings persisted to chrome.storage.local
Clear All Data button

features.name: JSON export
features.description: Export recording session to ProcessExport JSON schema v1.0.0
acceptanceCriteria: Exports to ProcessExport format with metadata and steps
Triggers file download with .json extension
Includes all action data, selectors, screenshots, and decision points

features.name: HTML export
features.description: Export recording session to styled, self-contained HTML document
acceptanceCriteria: Self-contained HTML with inline CSS
Step cards with screenshots and decision badges
Readable format for documentation sharing

features.name: Keyboard shortcuts
features.description: Global keyboard shortcuts for recording control
acceptanceCriteria: Ctrl+Shift+R starts recording
Ctrl+Shift+P pauses/resumes recording
Ctrl+Shift+S stops recording
Shortcuts defined in wxt.config.ts manifest

features.name: Wire user settings to capture pipeline
features.description: Connect chrome.storage.local settings to event capture and screenshot pipeline
acceptanceCriteria: Settings loaded on recording start
Screenshot quality, scroll throttle, input debounce use stored settings
Falls back to DEFAULT_CAPTURE_SETTINGS if no stored settings

features.name: Fix stop-to-idle race condition
features.description: Recording stays in stopped state for review instead of immediately going idle
acceptanceCriteria: Status transitions to stopped (not idle) on stop
Last session remains visible for review
New recording starts fresh from stopped state

features.name: Password input masking
features.description: Mask password field values before storing in IndexedDB
acceptanceCriteria: Input type=password captured as masked value
Actual password never stored in IndexedDB or exports

features.name: Push-based STATUS_UPDATE
features.description: Replace polling-based status checks with push-based STATUS_UPDATE broadcasts from background
acceptanceCriteria: Background broadcasts STATUS_UPDATE on every state change
SidePanel and Popup listen for STATUS_UPDATE messages
No interval-based polling for status

features.name: Persist drag reorder to IndexedDB
features.description: Save step reorder changes to IndexedDB with updated sequenceNumbers
acceptanceCriteria: Drag reorder updates sequenceNumber in DB via transaction
Reloading side panel preserves step order

features.name: Unified message listener
features.description: Consolidate multiple chrome.runtime.onMessage listeners into single switch handler
acceptanceCriteria: Single onMessage.addListener in background.ts
Switch/case pattern for message routing
Async handlers return true for sendResponse

features.name: Service worker state persistence
features.description: Persist recording state to chrome.storage.session to survive MV3 service worker termination
acceptanceCriteria: Status, sessionId, actionCount saved to chrome.storage.session
State restored on service worker restart via loadState()
Active session recoverable after SW termination

features.name: Prioritize data-testid in selectors
features.description: Add data-testid and data-test-id as highest priority selector strategy
acceptanceCriteria: data-testid checked before id in CSS selector generation
data-test-id as alias also supported
Confidence score 0.95 for data-testid selectors

features.name: Change events for special inputs
features.description: Capture change events for select, date, time, color, range inputs
acceptanceCriteria: Select element changes captured
Date/time/datetime-local/month/week input changes captured
Color picker and range slider changes captured

features.name: Confidence scoring for selectors
features.description: Assign stability confidence scores to generated CSS selectors
acceptanceCriteria: Scores: data-testid 0.95, id 0.90, aria-label 0.85, name 0.80, class 0.60, nth-of-type 0.20
Score stored in ElementSelector.confidence
Used by Playwright exporter for locator selection

features.name: Delete step with confirmation
features.description: Allow deleting individual steps from the recording with confirmation dialog
acceptanceCriteria: Delete button on step detail view
Confirmation dialog before delete
Step removed from IndexedDB and UI

features.name: Playwright test exporter
features.description: Export recording as executable Playwright test script with smart native locator cascade
acceptanceCriteria: Generates valid .spec.ts Playwright test file
Locator cascade: getByTestId > getByRole > getByLabel > getByPlaceholder > getByText > locator(css)
Handles click, input, scroll, navigate, submit action types
Password inputs use fill with masked placeholder
Confidence scores included as comments
17 tests passing
features.auditNote: getByText was missing from cascade, getByLabel misused for aria-label, no waitForLoadState or toBeVisible assertions. Fixed in AUDIT-04.

features.name: Zustand store as single source of truth
features.description: Centralized Zustand store replacing duplicated local state in 3 UI components
acceptanceCriteria: recordingStore with zustand/vanilla createStore
useRecordingStore hook via useSyncExternalStore (Preact compat)
State: status, session, actions, actionCount, error, selectedActionId, view
App.tsx, RecordingControls.tsx, Popup.tsx use store instead of local state
~60 lines of duplicated state eliminated

features.name: Action creators with DB sync
features.description: Async action creators that sync Zustand store mutations to IndexedDB
acceptanceCriteria: updateActionWithDb: updates DB then store
deleteActionWithDb: deletes from DB, removes from store, clears selection
reorderActionsWithDb: reorders in store and persists to DB
syncFromBackground: sends GET_STATUS and populates store from DB
handleStatusUpdate: processes STATUS_UPDATE messages into store

features.name: useBackgroundSync hook
features.description: Preact hook that syncs UI state with background service worker on mount and listens for STATUS_UPDATE
acceptanceCriteria: Calls syncFromBackground on mount
Listens for STATUS_UPDATE messages via chrome.runtime.onMessage
Cleans up listener on unmount
Used by both SidePanel App.tsx and Popup.tsx entry points

features.name: Implement backend-client.ts
features.description: Connect extension to ADK backend for LLM-powered action enrichment
acceptanceCriteria: POST action + screenshot to backend API endpoint
Receive enriched description, visual analysis, decision analysis
Handle network errors and timeouts gracefully
Configurable backend URL from chrome.storage.local

features.name: Backend URL configuration
features.description: Add backend URL setting to Options page
acceptanceCriteria: Text input for backend URL in Options page
URL validated before save
Stored in chrome.storage.local
backend-client.ts reads URL from storage

features.name: LLM description enrichment
features.description: Enrich action descriptions with LLM-generated natural language via Gemini description_generator agent
acceptanceCriteria: llmDescription field populated from description_generator agent response
Displayed alongside template description in step detail UI
Graceful fallback to template if backend unavailable

features.name: Visual analysis from Gemini
features.description: Analyze screenshots with Gemini vision via screenshot_analyzer agent
acceptanceCriteria: llmVisualAnalysis field populated from screenshot_analyzer agent response
Visual context includes UI elements, page context, layout type
Analysis results viewable in step detail

features.name: Intelligent decision point detection
features.description: Use decision_detector agent to identify decision points and document alternative branches
acceptanceCriteria: DecisionPoint populated with isDecisionPoint, reason, branches from agent
Replaces manual toggle with intelligent detection
Decision points visually highlighted in step list
features.auditNote: Decision points not visually highlighted in StepList yet — badge added in AUDIT-03.

features.name: Process documentation validation
features.description: Validate completeness and quality of recorded process via doc_validator agent (Gemini Pro)
acceptanceCriteria: doc_validator reviews full recording after stop
Reports missing steps, unclear descriptions, quality score
Validation results displayed in export panel

features.name: Complex analysis for edge cases
features.description: Use complex_analyzer agent (Claude Sonnet via Vertex) for deep analysis of ambiguous actions
acceptanceCriteria: Triggered for low-confidence actions from primary pipeline
Claude Sonnet 4.6 via Vertex AI LLMRegistry
Higher confidence results replace primary analysis

features.name: Video playback and export
features.description: Embed recorded tab video in HTML export with playback controls
acceptanceCriteria: Video blob embedded or linked in HTML export
Playback controls in HTML report
Timeline synced with step list

features.name: Session management
features.description: List, rename, and delete recording sessions from the side panel
acceptanceCriteria: Session list view with all recordings
Rename session functionality
Delete session with confirmation (cascades to actions and video)
Three-level navigation: sessions → list → detail
Back to sessions button when viewing past recordings
Sessions button in stopped state to return to session list

features.name: Import recordings
features.description: Import previously exported JSON recordings back into the extension
acceptanceCriteria: File picker for JSON import
Validate against ProcessExport schema
Create session and actions in IndexedDB

features.name: Multi-tab recording
features.description: Record actions across multiple browser tabs in a single session
acceptanceCriteria: Content script injected in all tabs during recording
Actions tagged with tab identifier
Tab switches captured as navigation events

features.name: Cloud sync and sharing
features.description: Sync recordings to cloud storage and share with team members
acceptanceCriteria: Cloud storage backend for recordings
Share links for individual recordings
Team workspace with shared recordings

features.name: Fix loadState race condition
features.description: await loadState() in background.ts to prevent stale state on GET_STATUS
acceptanceCriteria: loadState() promise stored and awaited in message handlers
GET_STATUS returns correct state after SW restart

features.name: VisualAnalysis type safety
features.description: Replace Record<string,any> casts in StepDetail with proper VisualAnalysis interface
acceptanceCriteria: VisualAnalysis interface defined in types.ts
CapturedAction.llmVisualAnalysis typed as VisualAnalysis
All 10 casts removed from StepDetail.tsx

features.name: Decision badges in StepList
features.description: Show decision point indicator badge in step list items
acceptanceCriteria: Decision badge visible next to description in StepList
Only shown when action.decisionPoint.isDecisionPoint is true

features.name: Playwright export reliability
features.description: Add waitForLoadState, toBeVisible assertions, getByText, fix getByLabel for aria-label
acceptanceCriteria: getByText in locator cascade before CSS fallback
getByRole with name for aria-label elements with role
waitForLoadState after navigate actions
expect().toBeVisible() before click/submit
Default case for unknown action types
New tests for all additions

features.name: Project hygiene
features.description: Add .gitattributes, delete nul file, update test counts in docs
acceptanceCriteria: .gitattributes added with LF normalization
nul file deleted
Test count updated in CLAUDE.md
npm test script added to root package.json
features.auditNote: nul file deletion requires manual rm on Windows — file is already in .gitignore
